component.name: Small LiPo Battery 3.7V
component.description: Small single-cell Lithium Polymer rechargeable battery with nominal voltage of 3.7V (4.2V fully charged, 3.0V discharged). Common capacities range from 100mAh to 2000mAh. Used to power Arduino and ESP32 projects. Requires proper charging circuit and protection.

pinRequirements.name: VCC/BAT+
pinRequirements.description: Positive battery terminal. Connect to VIN, BAT, or through charging/protection circuit. Provides 3.0V-4.2V depending on charge state.

pinRequirements.name: GND/BAT-
pinRequirements.description: Negative battery terminal (ground). Connect to system ground.

component.exampleUsage: Connect BAT+ to Arduino VIN or ESP32 BAT pin through a protection circuit (TP4056 or similar). Connect BAT- to GND. Use with voltage regulator if 3.3V is required. Never discharge below 3.0V or charge above 4.2V. Always use proper LiPo charging module.

assemblyInstructions.title: Prepare Components
assemblyInstructions.description: Gather all required components and verify they are in working condition.
tips: Check component datasheets for voltage requirements

assemblyInstructions.title: Connect Components
assemblyInstructions.description: Follow the pin mapping table to connect all components.
tips: Double-check all connections before powering on
warnings: Always verify connections before powering on to prevent damage
